title: People-Centric AI & Robotics
subtitle: Designing intelligent systems that prioritize human needs, safety, and societal value
intro: People-Centric AI & Robotics focuses on developing interactive systems where humans remain at the center of decision-making, ensuring transparency, trust, and meaningful collaboration between humans and machines.

vision.text: Create AI and robotic systems that enhance human capabilities while preserving autonomy, dignity, and social well-being.

mission.text: Advance human-robot collaboration, social intelligence, and responsible AI innovation for real-world impact.

activities.title: Human-Robot Collaboration
activities.text: Developing shared autonomy systems where humans and robots work together seamlessly in dynamic environments.

activities.title: Social Robotics
activities.text: Designing socially aware robots capable of natural interaction, empathy modeling, and adaptive communication.

activities.title: Responsible AI & Innovation
activities.text: Ensuring ethical, transparent, and safe deployment of AI systems aligned with societal values and regulations.

cta.title: Collaborate With Us
cta.text: We are looking for students, researchers, and industry partners interested in human-centered robotics and AI systems.
